items.name_en: Crimson·
items.name_cn:
Crimson·
New stunning bucket bag from the LE 5À7 series with a handle. New silhouette, made of Italian calfskin. The clean, structured shape looks structured yet not too sharp. Features metal studs at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. Gives a unique vibe that is both classic elegant and modern chic!
Model: 742828
Size: 26×20×12cm
